Why Did I Get Married? (2007)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $55,204,525Details
International Box Office $729,653
Worldwide Box Office $55,934,178
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $32,214,255
Total $32,214,255
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$21,353,789 (38.7% of total gross)
Legs:2.59 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:98.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$15,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,011 opening theaters/2,034 max. theaters, 4.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $95,966,011

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 12th, 2007 (Wide) by Lionsgate
Video Release: February 12th, 2008 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment, released as Tyler Perry's Why Did I Get Married?
MPA Rating: PG-13 for mature thematic material, sexual references and language.
Running Time: 118 minutes
Franchise: Why Did I Get Married
Plot point: Addiction, Relationship Advice, Relationships Gone Wrong, Romance, Writing and Writers
Subgenre: Comedy Drama
Source:Based on Play
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
